mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is already low and CPIAUCSL is still firm, markets infer that policy will stay accommodative while inflation stays sticky; that combination lifts risk appetite and inflation expectations, pushing the 10-year Treasury yield up over the next 20 trading days.
regime_hint: late-cycle disinflation with low policy rates
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day forward yield changes are negative in a majority of low-FEDFUNDS/high-CPIAUCSL episodes, or if the sign flips when CPIAUCSL is flat-to-falling.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in UNRATE signals labor-market deterioration and growth scare positioning; that shift increases duration demand and lowers the 10-year Treasury yield within 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if threshold-crossing UNRATE episodes are followed by higher 10-year yields more often than lower yields, or if the average 20-day yield change is non-negative.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in HOUST followed by softer RSAFS indicates weakening domestic demand and weaker forward growth, which should reduce inflation and term-premium pressure and pull the 10-year yield down over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if combined HOUST and RSAFS declines do not precede lower 20-day Treasury yields, especially when one series weakens without the other.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent declines in INDPRO reflect falling utilization and weaker industrial pricing power; as output pressure fades, inflation risk eases and the 10-year Treasury yield falls over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO falls month-over-month for 2 consecutive months
failure_condition: Reject if two-month consecutive INDPRO declines are followed by positive 20-day yield changes more than half the time, or if the average yield response is not negative.

mechanism_narrative: A policy-rate cut in FEDFUNDS is a direct easing signal that lowers expected short rates and compresses Treasury term structure, causing the 10-year yield to decline over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS declines by at least 25 bps from the prior month
failure_condition: Reject if rate-cut months are not followed by lower 5-day yield changes, or if the yield reaction is positive in a majority of cut episodes.

mechanism_narrative: A rebound in RSAFS together with firmer PAYEMS signals stronger nominal demand and employment income, which raises inflation compensation and growth expectations and pushes the 10-year yield up over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if simultaneous RSAFS and PAYEMS strength does not precede higher 20-day yields, or if the effect disappears when PAYEMS is flat.

mechanism_narrative: In a low-unemployment regime, a further decline in UNRATE indicates labor tightness and rising wage pressure; markets price more inflation and less easing, lifting the 10-year Treasury yield over a 60-day horizon.
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE at or below 4.0% does not precede higher 60-day yields, or if falling unemployment is associated with lower yields in this regime.

mechanism_narrative: In a housing-led slowdown, falling HOUST together with weak INDPRO signals broad supply and activity cooling; that mix reduces inflation expectations and term-premium pressure, causing the 10-year yield to fall over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if joint HOUST and INDPRO weakness is not followed by lower 20-day yields, or if the relationship reverses when only one of the two series weakens.
